top_signals.title: Polymarket probes private key compromise of internal top-up wallet after $660K drained on Polygon
top_signals.summary: Onchain sleuth ZachXBT flagged a potential exploit of Polymarket's UMA CTF Adapter on Polygon, with $520K reportedly drained so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
